series_metadata.series_title: GENERAL CORRESPONDENCE-OLIVER R OCASEK GOVERNMENT CENTER
series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence, including reports and memoranda, etc., relating to the construction and operation of the Oliver R. OCasek Government Building.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in operating area while project is under construction, or current calendar year, 1 additional year while in operating. in storage determined of no value
